mapper.select: SELECT * FROM booking ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM booking WHERE guest_id = #{guestId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM booking WHERE status = #{status} ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO booking (guest_id, room_id, check_in_date, check_out_date, status, special_requests) VALUES (#{guestId}, #{roomId}, #{checkInDate}, #{checkOutDate}, #{status}, #{specialRequests})
mapper.update: UPDATE booking SET status=#{status} WHERE id=#{id}
